_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Strategy involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of enterprise transformation program design, including operating model change, capability maturity progression, transformation roadmap construction, and change sequencing principles.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.491), LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.285). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan] vs WIDAI-only terms [capability, change, construction, design, enterprise, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.876, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DDaT element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Strategy involves creating a plan to achieve a team or organisation's objectives" and "Knowledge of enterprise transformation program design, including operating model" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.360 > STS 0.285 (gap +0.075). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [achieve, creating, involves, objectives, organisation, plan]. WIDAI terms: [capability, change, construction, design, enterprise, knowledge].
